subcodes.first_line: O Ibn Abhar! Thou hast been and art remembered before this Wronged One. Through God's grace mayest thou ever be the recipient of His bounties and be illumined by His effulgences [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن ابهر نزد مظلوم مذکور بوده و هستید لازال بعنایت حق فائز و باشراقات
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @exhortations and counsels, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
